VORFALE_TWEAKS.chat-render-optimizer.hin: Splits chat into an active session and file-backed archives so old chat can be removed from live ChatMessage loading without losing history.
VORFALE_TWEAKS.chat-render-optimizer.Act: For testing, this archives the oldest public chat messages while keeping the latest 500 public messages active.
VORFALE_TWEAKS.chat-render-optimizer.Sta: Vorfale Tweaks found {count} old public chat messages that can be moved out of live ChatMessage loading while keeping the latest {keep} public messages active.
For testing, this prompt works directly from game.messages and does not depend on the chat sidebar tabs.
VORFALE_TWEAKS.chat-render-optimizer.Arc: Archives are saved as JSON files in this world. Active chat is reduced only after the archive file is written successfully.
VORFALE_TWEAKS.chat-render-optimizer.Not: No old chat messages are ready to archive.
VORFALE_TWEAKS.chat-render-optimizer.Arc: Could not archive chat. Check the console before trying again.
VORFALE_TWEAKS.chat-render-optimizer.Con: This will save {count} oldest public chat messages to an archive file, keep at least {keep} recent live public messages, then remove the archived messages from active chat loading.
